title: Featured Work
text: Explore some of the projects I’ve worked on—from responsive websites to full-featured mobile apps—built with performance and usability in mind.

galleryItems.description: I maintained and improved a WordPress website by fixing bugs that affected performance and user experience. I added and customized features using plugins and theme updates, keeping the site functional and up to date.
